input.headline: The one thing that could halve your ultra-processed food consumption in a week

raw.headline: The one thing that could halve your ultra-processed food consumption in a week

winner: Why did I stop eating ultra-processed foods? Because my doctor said if I didn’t cut back, he’d start charging me for every slice of pizza I consumed—by the time!

candidates.text: Putting "low processed" labels on cookies didn't cut my consumption in half—it just made me question why I was buying them at all.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on the idea of labeling, specific to ultra-processed foods, concise and naturally humorous."}

candidates.text: Why did my ultra-processed food consumption split up with me? It said I was too *halved* for its taste!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke uses a pun on 'halve' and 'halved,' which is somewhat clever, but the setup is a bit forced and the humor feels underdeveloped. It lacks specificity in relating to the headline and could be more surprising."}

candidates.text: Why did I stop eating ultra-processed foods? Because my doctor said if I didn’t cut back, he’d start charging me for every slice of pizza I consumed—by the time!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke has a decent setup and a somewhat surprising twist, but the punchline feels a bit forced and lacks clarity. The reference to being charged 'by the time' is confusing and doesn't land as effectively as it could."}

candidates.text: The key to doubling my ultra-processed food consumption was binge-watching cooking shows—turns out, seeing people eat healthy just makes me crave the opposite even more!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat humorous with a twist, but it doesn't directly address the headline's promise of halving ultra-processed food consumption. It's specific and uses natural language, but lacks surprise and is slightly generic in its approach."}

candidates.text: Eating half an ultra-processed food is like doing a push-up with a single sleeve—it’s just not enough to feel the burn.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat creative with the push-up analogy, but 'half an ultra-processed food' is a bit awkward and not clearly relatable. The humor is mild and could be more surprising or specific."}
